content: It’s a ryzen 9.  Yes autobet also runs on the same system

Reference reply from 8: <think>So Sean clarified it's a Ryzen 9 machine, not a Pi. And autobet runs on the same system. Let me search harder for autobet - maybe it's installed elsewhere, in a different directory, running as a service, etc.</think>
Got it, Ryzen 9 — nice setup. Let me dig deeper for autobet.
```json
{"tool": "exec", "arguments": {"command": "find /home -name \"*autobet*\" 2>/dev/null; ps aux | grep -i autobet; systemctl list-units --type=service | grep -i autobet"}}
```
